course.name: Generative AI 2026: Build AI Apps and Agents
course.description: Kozi ya utekelezaji ya siku 30 kwa digital nomads wanaotumia AI kila siku na wanataka kuzindua bidhaa halisi ya kibiashara. Utafafanua ahadi wazi, kupunguza MVP, kujenga AI features za kuaminika, ku-deploy kwenye Vercel, kuongeza malipo ya Stripe, na kuzindua kwa mpango wa iteresheni unaoongozwa na maoni.

lessons.title: Utangulizi na matokeo
lessons.content:
# Lesson 1: Utangulizi na matokeo

**One-liner:** Weka ahadi wazi ya bidhaa na fafanua mafanikio yana maana gani.  
**Time:** 20 to 30 min  
**Deliverable:** Ahadi ya Bidhaa na Orodha ya Ukaguzi wa Mafanikio

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kufafanua ahadi ya bidhaa na vigezo vinavyopimika vya mafanikio kwa app ya AI inayouzwa.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Ahadi inataja mtumiaji maalum, tatizo, na matokeo.
- [ ] Orodha ya ukaguzi wa mafanikio ina angalau vigezo 5 vya ndio au hapana.
- [ ] Kipimo cha msingi kimeandikwa na tarehe.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Ahadi ya Bidhaa na Orodha ya Ukaguzi wa Mafanikio
- **Format:** Hati ya ukurasa mmoja pamoja na orodha ya ukaguzi
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayejenga app ya AI ya kibiashara
**Secondary persona(s):** Wateja wa awali wanaotaka kulipia suluhisho
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika au waasisi wenza

## What

### What it is
Ahadi fupi inayopimika inayoeleza ni nani app inamsaidia na matokeo halisi inayoleta.
Inakuwa msingi wa maamuzi yote ya bidhaa.

### What it is not
Si orodha ya vipengele au kauli ya uuzaji isiyo na uthibitisho.
Si kauli ndefu isiyoeleweka kwa mtumiaji.

### 2-minute theory
- Ahadi wazi hupunguza kupanuka kwa wigo usio na mpangilio.
- Vigezo vya mafanikio vinapima kama ahadi imetimia.
- Vipimo vya mapema huonyesha nini cha kujenga kwanza.

### Key terms
- **Product promise:** Ahadi ya sentensi moja kuhusu matokeo ya mtumiaji.
- **Success criteria:** Vigezo vya ndio au hapana vinavyoonyesha ahadi imetimia.

## Where

### Applies in
- Uamuzi wa mpango wa bidhaa na roadmap
- Maandishi ya ukurasa wa mauzo na utangulizi

### Does not apply in
- Majadiliano ya uboreshaji mdogo wa code

### Touchpoints
- Ukurasa wa mauzo
- Skrini ya utangulizi
- Maswali ya mara kwa mara
- Ukurasa wa bei

## When

### Use it when
- Unaanza wazo jipya la bidhaa ya AI
- Mradi wako unaonekana mpana kupita kiasi

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa kila wazo la bidhaa, kisha tathmini kila mwezi

### Late signals
- Vipengele vinaongezeka bila ushahidi wa faida
- Huwezi kueleza mafanikio kwa sentensi moja

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Maamuzi ya kujenga yanafanyika haraka
- Ujumbe wa mauzo unakuwa wazi
- Uthibitishaji wa awali unakuwa rahisi

### Risks of ignoring
- Kujenga vitu ambavyo hakuna anayetaka kulipia
- Ujumbe wa bidhaa kuwa wa kuchanganya

### Expectations
- Improves: umakini na kasi ya maamuzi
- Does not guarantee: product market fit

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Taja mtumiaji lengwa na tatizo lake kuu.
2. Fafanua matokeo halisi utakayoleta.
3. Andika ahadi ya sentensi moja.
4. Orodhesha vigezo 5 hadi 7 vya ndio au hapana.
5. Ongeza kipimo cha msingi na tarehe.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Tumia lugha rahisi ambayo mteja ataelewa
- Fanya kila kigezo kiwe cha ndio au hapana

**Don't**
- Changanya matokeo mengi kwenye ahadi moja
- Tumia maneno yasiyoeleweka kama "bora" bila kipimo

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Ahadi inaeleza vipengele badala ya matokeo. **Fix:** Badilisha vipengele na matokeo ya mtumiaji.
- **Mistake:** Vigezo ni vya hisia. **Fix:** Badilisha kuwa ndio au hapana.

### Done when
- [ ] Ahadi ni sentensi moja inayopimika.
- [ ] Vigezo vya mafanikio ni vya ndio au hapana.
- [ ] Kipimo cha msingi kimeandikwa.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Wazo lako la bidhaa kwa sentensi moja
- Maelezo kuhusu mtumiaji lengwa

### Steps
1. Andika ahadi ya bidhaa kwa sentensi moja.
2. Orodhesha vigezo 5 hadi 7 vya mafanikio.
3. Ongeza kipimo cha msingi na tarehe.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Mtumiaji lengwa | |
| Tatizo kuu | |
| Ahadi ya bidhaa | |
| Vigezo vya mafanikio | |
| Kipimo cha msingi | |

> **Pro tip:** Soma ahadi kwa sauti kuona kama mteja angeielewa.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Andika upya ahadi ili iwe fupi na wazi bila kubadilisha maana.

### Output
Ahadi mpya ya sentensi moja pamoja na vigezo vilivyoboreshwa.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, ahadi inataja mtumiaji maalum?
- [ ] Je, inataja matokeo maalum?
- [ ] Je, vigezo ni vya ndio au hapana?
- [ ] Je, kuna kipimo cha msingi chenye tarehe?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Vigezo 4 kati ya 6 vimetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **Value Proposition Canvas**. Strategyzer. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://www.strategyzer.com/canvas/value-proposition-canvas

2. **Lean Canvas**. Ash Maurya. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://leanstack.com/lean-canvas

## Read more (optional)

1. **The Mom Test**
   Why: Maswali ya kuthibitisha mahitaji ya kweli ya wateja.
   Read: https://momtestbook.com/

# Generative AI 2026: Build AI Apps and Agents - Siku 1

Utangulizi na matokeo

quizQuestions.question: Mjenzi anasema, "App yangu ya AI itatumia GPT-4 na dashibodi." Ni marekebisho gani yanafanya hii kuwa ahadi ya bidhaa yenye matokeo halisi katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: "App yangu ya AI itatumia GPT-4 na kuonyesha dashibodi nzuri kwa timu za kisasa."
"Wabunifu huru hupata muhtasari wa dakika 5 kutoka noti zenye fujo ili watume mapendekezo haraka."
"App itakuwa na templates, automations, na dirisha la mazungumzo kwa watumiaji."
"Tutaongeza modeli zaidi na integrations zaidi ili kufunika matumizi mengi."

quizQuestions.question: Mwanzilishi anaandika, "Timu zinaokoa muda kwa agent wetu." Ni kigezo gani cha mafanikio kinafaa zaidi kama kipimo cha ndio au hapana katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: "Watumiaji wanasema agent anahisi kusaidia na smart baada ya kujaribu."
"Angalau majaribio 7 kati ya 10 yanatoa rasimu inayotumika ndani ya dakika 8."
"Agent hukamilisha kazi haraka zaidi kuliko hapo awali kwa watumiaji wengi."
"Wateja wanakuwa wenye tija zaidi kwa ujumla baada ya kutumia app."

quizQuestions.question: Unahitaji kuchagua ahadi moja ili kudhibiti wigo kwa app ya AI inayolipiwa. Ni ahadi ipi inapunguza kupanuka kwa wigo kwa mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: "Eneo la kazi la AI linalofanya kila kitu kwa biashara ndogo zote."
"Tengeneza barua ya invoice inayokubalika kwa wajasiriamali huru wa EU ndani ya dakika 2."
"Dashibodi yenye AI chat, uploads, na analytics kwa timu zote."
"Tumia AI kuboresha utendaji wa biashara katika sekta zote."

quizQuestions.question: Mjenzi aliandika vigezo hivi: "inahisi haraka", "interface nzuri", na "watumiaji wanapenda". Marekebisho bora ni yapi katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: "Viache na uongeze kipimo kimoja cha kiufundi kama response time."
"Badilisha kuwa vigezo vya ndio au hapana vinavyohusiana na matokeo ya mtumiaji."
"Viondoe na uangalie tu kukamilika kwa vipengele."
"Uliza marafiki kama wanapenda interface na uitumie kama mafanikio."

quizQuestions.question: Ahadi ya bidhaa inasema, "Kusaidia nomads kusimamia mapendekezo ya wateja." Ni marekebisho gani yanaifanya iwe ya matokeo na inayopimika katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: "Kusaidia nomads kusimamia mapendekezo kwa interface nzuri na zana za AI."
"Nomads hubadilisha noti za mazungumzo kuwa rasimu ya pendekezo ndani ya dakika 10."
"Jukwaa la mapendekezo lenye AI, templates, na messaging."
"Simamia mapendekezo na miradi yote kwa freelancer yeyote."

quizQuestions.question: Unahitaji kipimo cha msingi kwa ahadi mpya ya msaidizi wa AI. Ni kipimo kipi kinafaa zaidi katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: "Muda wa wastani kupata rasimu inayotumika katika majaribio 10 ni dakika 14."
"Agent anahisi haraka na laini ninapotumia."
"Tunapanga kuwa haraka kuliko washindani mwaka huu."
"Watu wataipenda bidhaa itakapokamilika."

quizQuestions.question: Mwanzilishi ana ahadi nzuri lakini anaongeza vipengele kila mara. Hatua bora inayolingana na somo hili ni ipi katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: "Ongeza vipengele na urekebishe ahadi ijumuishe vyote."
"Rudia kuangalia ahadi na orodha ya ukaguzi kabla ya kuongeza kipengele."
"Puuza ahadi na zingatia uzinduzi mkubwa."
"Sitisha mradi hadi vipengele vyote vipangwe."

lessons.title: Uchaguzi wa tatizo na niche
lessons.content:
# Lesson 2: Uchaguzi wa tatizo na niche

**One-liner:** Chagua tatizo la kweli lenye ishara za ununuzi na niche nyembamba.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Orodha ya Matatizo na Ishara za Ununuzi

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kuchagua tatizo na niche lenye ushahidi wa nia ya kulipia.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Orodha ina angalau matatizo 3 yanayohusiana na kundi maalum la watumiaji.
- [ ] Kila tatizo lina angalau ishara 2 za ununuzi.
- [ ] Tatizo moja limechaguliwa na sababu wazi.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Orodha ya Matatizo na Ishara za Ununuzi
- **Format:** Jedwali pamoja na maelezo ya aya moja
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayechuja mawazo ya bidhaa
**Secondary persona(s):** Wanunuzi wa awali katika niche maalum
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washauri au waasisi wenza

## What

### What it is
Utafiti mfupi unaobadili mawazo kuwa matatizo yanayopimika na ishara za ununuzi.
Unakusaidia kuchagua niche kwa ushahidi, si hype.

### What it is not
Si uorodheshaji wa vipengele au ufuatiliaji wa trend bila uthibitisho.
Si kura za mtandaoni pekee.

### 2-minute theory
- Ishara za ununuzi zinaonyesha watu tayari wanalipa au kutafuta suluhisho.
- Niche nyembamba huleta ujumbe wa mauzo uliolengwa.
- Tatizo lililo wazi linaongeza kasi ya majaribio.

### Key terms
- **Buyer signals:** Ushahidi kwamba watu tayari wanalipa au kutafuta suluhisho.
- **Niche:** Kundi maalum la watumiaji wenye tatizo la pamoja.

## Where

### Applies in
- Uthibitishaji wa wazo
- Uwekaji wa nafasi ya bidhaa

### Does not apply in
- Uboreshaji wa ndani wa code

### Touchpoints
- Jamii za wataalamu
- Masoko ya freelancers
- SaaS directories
- Matokeo ya utafutaji

## When

### Use it when
- Una mawazo kadhaa ya bidhaa
- Unahitaji kuchagua tatizo la kuanzia

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa kila wazo la bidhaa

### Late signals
- Huwezi kutaja anayelipa
- Huwezi kuelezea workflow ya mtumiaji

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Uthibitishaji wa haraka
- Ujumbe wa mauzo unaoeleweka
- Majaribio bora ya bei

### Risks of ignoring
- Kujenga kwa soko lisilo wazi
- Ukosefu wa ushahidi wa mahitaji

### Expectations
- Improves: uwazi na umakini
- Does not guarantee: mapato

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Orodhesha makundi 3 ya watumiaji unaowajua.
2. Andika tatizo moja la kila kundi.
3. Ongeza ishara za ununuzi kwa kila tatizo.
4. Panga kwa uwazi na ushahidi.
5. Chagua moja na uandike sababu.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Tumia ishara halisi kama bidhaa zinazolipiwa
- Weka tatizo maalum na la muktadha

**Don't**
- Chagua tatizo kwa sababu ni trend
- Chagua niche usiyoweza kufikia

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Tatizo ni pana sana. **Fix:** Ongeza workflow na muktadha.
- **Mistake:** Hakuna ishara za ununuzi. **Fix:** Tafuta washindani wanaolipiwa au bajeti zilizotajwa.

### Done when
- [ ] Angalau tatizo moja lina ishara kali za ununuzi.
- [ ] Tatizo lililochaguliwa ni maalum.
- [ ] Sababu imeandikwa katika aya moja.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Makundi 3 ya watumiaji
- Orodha ya maumivu uliyoona

### Steps
1. Andika tatizo moja kwa kila kundi.
2. Ongeza ishara 2 za ununuzi kwa kila tatizo.
3. Panga matatizo kwa kipaumbele.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Kundi la mtumiaji | |
| Tamko la tatizo | |
| Ishara za ununuzi | |
| Cheo na sababu | |

> **Pro tip:** Mshindani anayelipiwa ni ishara kali kuliko likes nyingi.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Andika upya tamko la tatizo ili liwe maalum zaidi na linalopimika.

### Output
Tamko jipya la tatizo na sababu ya sentensi moja.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, tatizo linataja kundi maalum la mtumiaji?
- [ ] Je, linaeleza workflow halisi?
- [ ] Je, kuna ishara 2 za ununuzi?
- [ ] Je, tatizo moja limechaguliwa na sababu?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Matatizo 2 kati ya 3 yana ishara nzuri
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **The Mom Test**. Rob Fitzpatrick. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://momtestbook.com/

2. **The Lean Startup**. Eric Ries. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://theleanstartup.com/

## Read more (optional)

1. **Value Proposition Canvas**
   Why: Husaidia kuelewa tatizo na faida kwa niche.
   Read: https://www.strategyzer.com/canvas/value-proposition-canvas

options: Kura ya Twitter yenye watu 200 wamepiga kura kwa wazo hilo katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Chombo kinacholipiwa chenye wateja katika niche hiyo na bei zinazoongezeka katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Thread ya Reddit yenye upvotes nyingi bila malipo yoyote katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Marafiki wanasema wazo linaonekana zuri katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.

quizQuestions.question: Tamko la tatizo linasema, "Watu wanahitaji zana bora za AI." Marekebisho bora ni yapi katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: Liache na uende kwenye vipengele mara moja katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Badilisha kuwa mtumiaji maalum, workflow, na matokeo yanayopimika katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Ongeza vivumishi kama haraka na smart katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Ongeza zana zaidi kwenye stack katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.

quizQuestions.question: Nomad analenga "freelancers wote". Ni marekebisho gani yanaunda niche bora katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: "Freelancers wote duniani" katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
"Wabunifu huru wanaotuma mapendekezo kila wiki" katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
"Mtu yeyote anayetumia email" katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
"Watu wanaopenda AI" katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.

quizQuestions.question: Ni orodha ipi inaonyesha seti ya ishara nzuri za ununuzi kwa tatizo katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: Likes nyingi, maoni machache, na share moja katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Zana zinazolipiwa, job posts zinazoomba matokeo, na bajeti kwenye RFPs katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Blog post moja na swali moja la forum katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Video yenye viral na meme katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.

quizQuestions.question: Mjenzi anapanga matatizo kwa jinsi yanavyofurahisha. Marekebisho bora ni yapi katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: Panga kwa idadi ya zana zitakazotumika katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Panga kwa ishara za ununuzi na uwazi wa workflow katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Panga kwa jinsi wazo ni jipya katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Panga kwa reactions za mitandao ya kijamii pekee katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.

quizQuestions.question: Tatizo ni "timu zenye shughuli nyingi zinapata shida kupanga". Nini kinaifanya iwe ya kupimika katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: "Timu zenye shughuli nyingi zinapata shida kupanga, hivyo tutatumia AI" katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
"Timu za wabunifu za remote zinahitaji muhtasari ndani ya dakika 10 baada ya kila simu ya mteja" katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
"Mipango ni migumu na huchukua muda" katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
"Timu zinataka software bora" katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.

quizQuestions.question: Mjenzi ana matatizo matatu na lazima achague moja. Ni kanuni ipi ya uamuzi ni bora katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI?
options: Chagua iliyo na ishara nyingi za ununuzi na workflow iliyo wazi katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Chagua wazo lenye ugumu mkubwa wa kiufundi katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Chagua lenye likes nyingi zaidi katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.
Chagua linaloendana na model inayotrend katika mazingira ya kibiashara ya app ya AI.

lessons.title: Mtumiaji lengwa na JTBD
lessons.content:
# Lesson 3: Mtumiaji lengwa na JTBD

**One-liner:** Eleza mtumiaji mkuu na kazi kuu anayotaka kukamilisha.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Persona na Tamko la JTBD

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kufafanua mtumiaji mkuu na JTBD iliyo wazi kwa app yako ya AI.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Persona ina jukumu, muktadha, na vizuizi.
- [ ] Tamko la JTBD lina muundo wazi.
- [ ] Tamko linaendana na tatizo lililochaguliwa.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Persona na Tamko la JTBD
- **Format:** Hati ya ukurasa mmoja
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayebuni kwa niche maalum
**Secondary persona(s):** Wanaoshawishi uamuzi wa ununuzi
**Stakeholders (optional):** Wanaidhinisha bajeti

## What

### What it is
Persona inayojumuisha jukumu, muktadha, na vizuizi pamoja na tamko la JTBD lenye matokeo.
Vyote kwa pamoja vinaongoza nini unajenga na jinsi unavyowasilisha.

### What it is not
Si profile ya demografia pekee au orodha ya vipengele.
Si hadithi ndefu isiyosaidia maamuzi.

### 2-minute theory
- JTBD inalenga matokeo, si zana.
- Persona huongeza muktadha wa kweli wa kazi.
- JTBD iliyo wazi hufanya maamuzi ya UX kuwa rahisi.

### Key terms
- **JTBD:** Kazi ambayo mtumiaji humwajiri bidhaa kukamilisha.
- **Persona:** Maelezo mafupi ya mtumiaji na muktadha wake.

## Where

### Applies in
- Maamuzi ya bidhaa
- Ujumbe wa mauzo na utangulizi

### Does not apply in
- Uboreshaji mdogo wa performance

### Touchpoints
- Ukurasa wa mauzo
- Utangulizi
- Makala za msaada

## When

### Use it when
- Umechagua tatizo na niche
- Unahitaji kuoanisha vipengele na matokeo

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa kila wazo la bidhaa, kisha tathmini kila robo mwaka

### Late signals
- Vipengele havilingani na lengo la mtumiaji
- Ujumbe unaonekana wa jumla

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Wigo wa bidhaa unaeleweka
- Ujumbe wa mauzo unaimarika
- Uthibitishaji wa mtumiaji unaenda haraka

### Risks of ignoring
- Kujenga kwa mtumiaji asiye sahihi
- Ujumbe wa bidhaa kuchanganya

### Expectations
- Improves: uwazi na umakini
- Does not guarantee: conversion

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Taja jukumu la mtumiaji mkuu na muktadha.
2. Orodhesha vizuizi na maumivu.
3. Andika tamko la JTBD lenye matokeo na muda.
4. Hakiki linaendana na tatizo.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Fanya matokeo ya JTBD yawe wazi na ya kupimika
- Weka persona fupi na halisi

**Don't**
- Tumia demografia bila muktadha
- Andika JTBD kama orodha ya vipengele

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Persona ni pana sana. **Fix:** Ongeza jukumu na workflow.
- **Mistake:** JTBD ni pana. **Fix:** Ongeza matokeo na muda.

### Done when
- [ ] Persona ina jukumu, muktadha, na vizuizi.
- [ ] Tamko la JTBD lina matokeo wazi.
- [ ] Linaendana na tatizo.

lessons.title: Ahadi ya thamani na nadharia ya bei

# Lesson 4: Ahadi ya thamani na nadharia ya bei

**One-liner:** Unda ahadi ya thamani iliyo wazi na wazo la bei ya kuanzia.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Ahadi ya Thamani na Rasimu ya Bei

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kuandika ahadi ya thamani na nadharia ya bei ya kuanzia.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Ahadi ya thamani inataja mtumiaji, tatizo, na matokeo.
- [ ] Bei ina namba, unit, na mnunuzi lengwa.
- [ ] Sababu imeandikwa katika sentensi mbili.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Ahadi ya Thamani na Rasimu ya Bei
- **Format:** Hati ya ukurasa mmoja
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayethibitisha bei
**Secondary persona(s):** Wanunuzi wa awali
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washauri au waasisi wenza

## What

### What it is
Sentensi moja inayoeleza kwa nini bidhaa inafaa kulipiwa na bei ya kuanzia.
Inatoa msingi wa mazungumzo na wanunuzi wa awali.

### What it is not
Si bei ya mwisho wala mpango kamili wa biashara.
Si orodha ya vipengele pekee.

### 2-minute theory
- Bei ni nadharia hadi wateja wa kweli waikubali.
- Ahadi ya thamani iliyo maalum ni rahisi kupima.
- Unit ya bei huifanya iwe rahisi kupima.

### Key terms
- **Value proposition:** Ahadi ya thamani inayohusiana na matokeo ya mtumiaji.
- **Pricing unit:** Msingi wa bei kama kwa mwezi au kwa mradi.

## Where

### Applies in
- Ukurasa wa mauzo
- Mazungumzo ya uuzaji

### Does not apply in
- Uboreshaji wa ndani

### Touchpoints
- Ukurasa wa bei
- Checkout copy
- Onboarding

## When

### Use it when
- Una tatizo, niche, na JTBD
- Unahitaji bei ya kuanzia kwa majaribio

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa kila wazo, kisha rekebisha baada ya majaribio

### Late signals
- Bei haiwezi kuelezwa kwa sentensi moja
- Ahadi inaonekana kama orodha ya vipengele

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Ujumbe wazi
- Majaribio ya haraka
- Mazungumzo bora na wanunuzi

### Risks of ignoring
- Kutoza chini au juu kupita kiasi
- Uwekaji wa bidhaa usioeleweka

### Expectations
- Improves: uwazi na upimaji
- Does not guarantee: mapato

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Andika ahadi ya thamani kwa sentensi moja.
2. Chagua unit ya bei.
3. Chagua bei ya kuanzia.
4. Andika sababu kwa sentensi mbili.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Funga thamani kwa matokeo maalum
- Tumia unit wazi kama kwa mwezi

**Don't**
- Ficha bei kwa lugha isiyo wazi
- Kutoa bei bila sababu

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Ahadi ni ya jumla. **Fix:** Ongeza mtumiaji na matokeo.
- **Mistake:** Bei haina unit. **Fix:** Ongeza kwa mwezi au kwa mradi.

### Done when
- [ ] Ahadi ni sentensi moja.
- [ ] Bei ina namba na unit.
- [ ] Sababu imeandikwa.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Tamko la JTBD
- Noti kuhusu bajeti ya mnunuzi

### Steps
1. Andika ahadi ya thamani.
2. Chagua unit ya bei.
3. Weka bei ya kuanzia.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Ahadi ya thamani | |
| Unit ya bei | |
| Bei ya kuanzia | |
| Sababu ya bei | |

> **Pro tip:** Tumia bei inayokusisimua kidogo, kisha ipime.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Fupisha ahadi ili iwe wazi zaidi bila kubadilisha bei.

### Output
Ahadi iliyoboreshwa na bei ile ile.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, inataja mtumiaji na matokeo?
- [ ] Je, bei ina unit?
- [ ] Je, sababu imeandikwa?
- [ ] Je, ni rahisi kueleza kwa mnunuzi?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Vigezo 2 kati ya 4 vimetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **Monetizing Innovation**. Madhavan Ramanujam. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://hbr.org/product/monetizing-innovation/15830-PDF-ENG

2. **Value Proposition Canvas**. Strategyzer. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://www.strategyzer.com/canvas/value-proposition-canvas

## Read more (optional)

1. **Pricing Strategy**
   Why: Njia za kujaribu bei mapema.
   Read: https://www.strategyzer.com/blog/pricing-strategy

lessons.title: Kuweka wigo wa toleo la kwanza
lessons.content:
# Lesson 5: Kuweka wigo wa toleo la kwanza

**One-liner:** Fafanua seti ndogo ya vipengele vinavyoweza kuuzwa.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Orodha ya Wigo wa MVP

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kuunda wigo wa MVP unaoendana na ahadi ya bidhaa.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Orodha ina must have na later.
- [ ] Kila must have inaendana na matokeo ya ahadi.
- [ ] Wigo unatosha kwa toleo la kwanza.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Orodha ya Wigo wa MVP
- **Format:** Orodha ya safu mbili
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayefafanua wigo wa MVP
**Secondary persona(s):** Watumiaji na wanunuzi wa awali
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika

## What

### What it is
Orodha fupi ya must have inayothibitisha ahadi ya bidhaa kwa toleo la kwanza.
Inalenga matokeo ambayo watumiaji watalipia.

### What it is not
Si roadmap kamili wala bidhaa ya baadaye.
Si orodha kubwa ya vipengele vyote.

### 2-minute theory
- Wigo unapaswa kuthibitisha ahadi haraka.
- Vipengele vya baadaye vinaweza kusubiri.
- MVP ndogo hupunguza muda na gharama ya kujifunza.

### Key terms
- **MVP:** Minimum viable product inayoweza kulipiwa.
- **Must have:** Vipengele vinavyohitajika kufikia matokeo.

## Where

### Applies in
- Mpango wa bidhaa
- Upangaji wa kazi

### Does not apply in
- Uboreshaji wa miundombinu

### Touchpoints
- Backlog
- Roadmap
- Sprint planning

## When

### Use it when
- Ahadi na JTBD ziko wazi
- Unahitaji kuchagua nini cha kujenga kwanza

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa kila wazo, kisha rekebisha baada ya feedback

### Late signals
- Unaongeza vipengele kabla ya launch
- MVP ni kubwa kupita mwezi mmoja

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Launch ya haraka
- Vipaumbele wazi
- Uthibitishaji rahisi

### Risks of ignoring
- Kuchelewa kuwasilisha
- Feature creep

### Expectations
- Improves: umakini na kasi
- Does not guarantee: traction

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Orodhesha vipengele vyote vinavyowezekana.
2. Chagua vinavyohitajika kuthibitisha ahadi.
3. Hamisha vilivyobaki kwenda later.
4. Hakikisha must have ni ndogo na ya kuezeka.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Funga must have na matokeo ya mtumiaji
- Weka orodha fupi

**Don't**
- Ongeza vipengele kwa kila hali
- Changanya nice to have na must have

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** MVP kubwa sana. **Fix:** Ondoa vipengele visivyo lazima.
- **Mistake:** Hatua muhimu inakosekana. **Fix:** Ongeza hatua muhimu tu.

### Done when
- [ ] Must have ina vipengele 3 hadi 6.
- [ ] Kila kipengele kinaendana na ahadi.
- [ ] Later ni ndefu kuliko must have.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Ahadi ya bidhaa
- Orodha ya vipengele vya uwezekano

### Steps
1. Angazia vipengele vinavyothibitisha ahadi.
2. Hamisha vingine kwenda later.
3. Punguza hadi idadi ndogo.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Must have | |
| Later | |
| Ulinganifu wa ahadi | |
| Hatari ya launch | |

> **Pro tip:** Ikiwa kipengele hakibadilishi matokeo, si MVP.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Ondoa kipengele kimoja kutoka must have na eleza sababu.

### Output
Orodha iliyosasishwa ya MVP na sababu fupi.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, kila must have inaendana na ahadi?
- [ ] Je, orodha ni ndogo ya kusafirishwa?
- [ ] Je, later imewekwa wazi?
- [ ] Je, kuna sababu ya wigo?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Vigezo 3 kati ya 4 vimetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **The Lean Startup**. Eric Ries. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://theleanstartup.com/

2. **Inspired**. Marty Cagan. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://www.siliconvalley-product.com/inspired-how-to-create-tech-products-customers-love/

## Read more (optional)

   Why: Mwongozo wa kuweka wigo wa MVP.
   Read: https://www.atlassian.com/agile/product-management/minimum-viable-product

- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayebuni mtiririko wa mtumiaji
**Secondary persona(s):** Watumiaji lengwa
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika

## What

### What it is
Njia rahisi kutoka hatua ya mwanzo hadi matokeo.
Inaonyesha skrini na vitendo vya lazima.

### What it is not
Si design ya mwisho wala mockup kamili.
Si orodha ya vipengele pekee.

### 2-minute theory
- Mtiririko wazi hupunguza utata wa kujenga.
- Story map hufichua hatua zinazokosekana.
- Mtiririko mfupi huongeza activation.

### Key terms
- **User flow:** Mlolongo wa hatua za mtumiaji.
- **Story map:** Muundo wa hatua na kazi zake.

## Where

### Applies in
- UX planning
- Upangaji wa kazi

### Does not apply in
- Mabadiliko ya rangi

### Touchpoints
- Signup
- Uingizaji wa taarifa
- Skrini ya matokeo

## When

### Use it when
- MVP imefafanuliwa
- Unaandaa ujenzi wa kwanza

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa bidhaa, rekebisha kwa feedback

### Late signals
- Watumiaji wanakwama kwenye utangulizi
- Unaongeza skrini bila matokeo

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Utekelezaji wa haraka
- Uzoefu bora wa mtumiaji
- Hatua muhimu hazikosekani

### Risks of ignoring
- Mtiririko wenye kuchanganya
- Kazi ya kurudia

### Expectations
- Improves: uwazi na usability
- Does not guarantee: conversion

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Fafanua mwanzo na matokeo.
2. Orodhesha hatua 5 hadi 8.
3. Andika story map na majukumu.
4. Hakiki kila hatua dhidi ya ahadi.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Weka hatua rahisi na za mfululizo
- Funga kila hatua na matokeo

**Don't**
- Ongeza hatua ili kuonyesha vipengele
- Ruka hatua ya uthibitisho

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Input inakosekana. **Fix:** Ongeza hatua ya input.
- **Mistake:** Hatua ni nyingi. **Fix:** Ondoa zisizo muhimu.

### Done when
- [ ] Mwanzo na mwisho ni wazi.
- [ ] Story map ina hatua na majukumu.
- [ ] Kila hatua inaendana na ahadi.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Orodha ya MVP
- Ahadi ya bidhaa

### Steps
1. Andika mwanzo na mwisho.
2. Orodhesha hatua kwa mfuatano.
3. Ongeza majukumu kwa kila hatua.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Mwanzo | |
| Hatua | |
| Matokeo | |
| Hatari | |

> **Pro tip:** Kama hatua haibadilishi hali ya mtumiaji, iondoe.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Ondoa hatua moja na uone kama matokeo bado yapo.

### Output
Mtiririko ulioboreshwa na maelezo mafupi.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, mwanzo na mwisho ni wazi?
- [ ] Je, hatua ziko kwa mpangilio?
- [ ] Je, kila hatua ni muhimu?
- [ ] Je, inalingana na MVP?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Vigezo 3 kati ya 4 vimetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **User Story Mapping**. Jeff Patton. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://jpattonassociates.com/user-story-mapping/

2. **Lean UX**. Jeff Gothelf. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://www.oreilly.com/library/view/lean-ux/9781449311650/

## Read more (optional)

1. **UX Flow Basics**
   Why: Mifumo ya mtiririko wa kwanza.
   Read: https://www.nngroup.com/articles/user-flows/

# Lesson 7: Uamuzi wa tech stack

**One-liner:** Chagua stack rahisi inayowezesha kusafirishwa haraka.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Hati ya Uamuzi wa Stack

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kuchagua stack inayounga mkono MVP na vizuizi vyako.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Stack inajumuisha frontend, backend, hosting, na payments.
- [ ] Chaguo lina sababu tatu zilizoandikwa.
- [ ] Stack inaendana na muda wa kujenga.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Hati ya Uamuzi wa Stack
- **Format:** Hati ya ukurasa mmoja
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayechagua stack
**Secondary persona(s):** Washirika wa ujenzi
**Stakeholders (optional):** Watumiaji wa awali

## What

### What it is
Uamuzi wa vitendo wa zana unazoweza kusafirishwa sasa.
Unasawazisha kasi, urahisi, na uwezo unaohitajika.

### What it is not
Si mpango wa architecture wa miaka mingi.
Si stack ya kuonyesha tu teknolojia mpya.

### 2-minute theory
- Stack rahisi husafirishwa haraka.
- Huduma chache hupunguza matatizo.
- Stack bora ni ile unayoweza ku-deploy leo.

### Key terms
- **Stack:** Zana za kujenga na kuendesha bidhaa.
- **Constraint:** Kizuizi kama muda au bajeti.

## Where

### Applies in
- Mipango ya kiufundi
- Setup ya ujenzi

### Does not apply in
- Mipango ya scaling ya mbali

### Touchpoints
- README
- Deployment config
- Billing setup

## When

### Use it when
- Uko tayari kujenga
- Unahitaji kuamua zana msingi

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa bidhaa, kisha baada ya launch

### Late signals
- Unabadilisha zana mara kwa mara
- Mradi unakwama kwa setup

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Ujenzi wa haraka
- Onboarding rahisi
- Debugging rahisi

### Risks of ignoring
- Tool churn
- Kasi ndogo

### Expectations
- Improves: kasi ya kusafirishwa
- Does not guarantee: scalability

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Orodhesha uwezo unaohitajika.
2. Chagua zana zinazolingana na ujuzi wako.
3. Thibitisha hosting na payments.
4. Andika sababu tatu za chaguo.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Chagua zana zenye docs wazi
- Punguza huduma zisizo muhimu

**Don't**
- Chagua zana kwa hype
- Ongeza huduma zisizo za lazima

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Zana nyingi sana. **Fix:** Ondoa zisizo muhimu.
- **Mistake:** Stack haina payments. **Fix:** Ongeza Stripe mapema.

### Done when
- [ ] Frontend, backend, hosting, na payments zimewekwa.
- [ ] Sababu tatu zimeandikwa.
- [ ] Stack inaendana na muda.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Orodha ya uwezo wa MVP
- Ujuzi na vizuizi

### Steps
1. Orodhesha uwezo unaohitajika.
2. Chagua zana kwa kila uwezo.
3. Andika sababu tatu.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Uwezo | Tool |
| Sababu 1 | |
| Sababu 2 | |
| Sababu 3 | |

> **Pro tip:** Stack rahisi unayoweza kusafirishwa ni bora kuliko stack kamili usiyoijua.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Ondoa tool moja na eleza kwa nini stack bado inafanya kazi.

### Output
Hati iliyosasishwa.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, stack inajumuisha frontend, backend, hosting, payments?
- [ ] Je, sababu zinahusiana na kasi na urahisi?
- [ ] Je, unaweza kuijenga kwa ujuzi wako?
- [ ] Je, inaendana na muda?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Vigezo 3 kati ya 4 vimetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **The Pragmatic Programmer**. Andrew Hunt and David Thomas. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://pragprog.com/titles/tpp20/the-pragmatic-programmer-20th-anniversary-edition/

2. **Stripe Docs**. Stripe. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://stripe.com/docs

## Read more (optional)

1. **Vercel Docs**
   Why: Docs za hosting rahisi.
   Read: https://vercel.com/docs

lessons.content:
# Lesson 8: Repo setup na Git hygiene

**One-liner:** Unda repo safi ya GitHub na workflow rahisi.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Repo yenye README na sheria za msingi

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kusanidi repo ya GitHub yenye workflow safi kwa app ndogo ya AI.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Repo ina README wazi na license.
- [ ] Sheria za branching zimeandikwa.
- [ ] Issues zimeundwa kwa kazi muhimu.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Repo yenye README na sheria za msingi
- **Format:** GitHub repository
- **Where saved:** Akaunti ya GitHub na noti za kozi

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayesimamia repo ya solo
**Secondary persona(s):** Washirika wa ujenzi
**Stakeholders (optional):** Wateja wa awali

## What

### What it is
Repo safi ya GitHub yenye README, license, issues, na sheria rahisi za branching.
Inapanga kazi na huifanya iwe rahisi kushirikiana.

### What it is not
Si workflow ya enterprise iliyo ngumu.
Si mfumo wa CI mkubwa.

### 2-minute theory
- Repo safi hupunguza msuguano.
- Issues husaidia kufuatilia kazi.
- README nzuri huongeza uaminifu.

### Key terms
- **Repository:** Nyumbani kwa code na docs.
- **Branching rule:** Sera rahisi ya mabadiliko na merges.

## Where

### Applies in
- GitHub
- Local development

### Does not apply in
- Pipelines ngumu za deployment

### Touchpoints
- README
- Issues
- Branch settings

## When

### Use it when
- Unaanza ujenzi
- Unataka kushirikiana

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa repo

### Late signals
- Historia ya commits isiyo safi
- Kazi isiyo na mwenye

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Ushirikiano wa haraka
- Dokumenti wazi
- Migongano michache ya merge

### Risks of ignoring
- Kazi kupotea
- Onboarding kuwa ngumu

### Expectations
- Improves: uwazi na teamwork
- Does not guarantee: bugs chache

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Unda repo na ongeza README.
2. Ongeza license na issue templates.
3. Andika sheria ya branching.
4. Unda issues 5 za MVP.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Weka README fupi na muhimu
- Tumia issues kufuatilia kazi

**Don't**
- Commit secrets
- Kufanya kazi kwenye main bila mpango

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Hakuna README. **Fix:** Andika sehemu ya setup na purpose.
- **Mistake:** Hakuna issues. **Fix:** Ongeza tasks kama issues.

### Done when
- [ ] README inaeleza app inafanya nini.
- [ ] Sheria ya branching imeandikwa.
- [ ] Angalau issues 5 zipo.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Orodha ya MVP
- Akaunti ya GitHub

### Steps
1. Unda repo na README.
2. Ongeza license na issue template.
3. Unda issues 5 za MVP.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Repo URL | |
| Muhtasari wa README | |
| Branch rule | |
| Orodha ya issues | |

> **Pro tip:** Tumia issue moja kwa kila kipengele muhimu.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Sasisha README ili itaje mtumiaji na matokeo.

### Output
README iliyoboreshwa.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, README inataja mtumiaji na matokeo?
- [ ] Je, issues ni wazi na zenye wigo?
- [ ] Je, secrets zimezuiwa?
- [ ] Je, sheria ya branch imeandikwa?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Vigezo 3 kati ya 4 vimetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** GitHub

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **GitHub Docs**. GitHub. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://docs.github.com/

2. **Keep a Changelog**. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://keepachangelog.com/

## Read more (optional)

1. **How to Write a README**
   Why: Miongozo ya README bora.
   Read: https://www.makeareadme.com/

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayejenga msingi wa app
**Secondary persona(s):** Washirika wa ujenzi
**Stakeholders (optional):** Watumiaji wa awali

## What

### What it is
Muundo mdogo wa folders pamoja na env template inayolinda secrets.
Inafanya setup ya local na deployment kuwa thabiti.

### What it is not
Si mabadiliko makubwa ya architecture.
Si mpango wa usalama kamili.

### 2-minute theory
- Muundo wazi huongeza kasi ya maendeleo.
- Env templates hupunguza missing keys.
- Secrets nje ya code hupunguza hatari.

### Key terms
- **Env template:** Faili ya kuonyesha keys zinazohitajika.
- **Project skeleton:** Muundo wa msingi wa mradi.

## Where

### Applies in
- Local development
- Deployment setup

### Does not apply in
- Maamuzi ya UI design

### Touchpoints
- .env.example
- .gitignore
- Muundo wa folders

## When

### Use it when
- Unaanza development
- Unajiandaa kwa deployment

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa mradi, rekebisha ukiongeza services

### Late signals
- Missing env vars husababisha crash
- Code na config zimechanganywa

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Setup ya haraka
- Ulinzi wa secrets
- Onboarding safi

### Risks of ignoring
- Deployment kushindwa
- API keys kuvuja

### Expectations
- Improves: uthabiti na usalama
- Does not guarantee: security kamili

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Tengeneza folder tree ya msingi.
2. Ongeza .env.example na keys.
3. Update .gitignore ili kuzuia .env.
4. Hakiki local run kwa values za mfano.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Tenganisha config na code
- Andika keys zinazohitajika

**Don't**
- Commit API keys halisi
- Ficha keys ndani ya code

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Hakuna env template. **Fix:** Ongeza .env.example.
- **Mistake:** Secrets zimo repo. **Fix:** Badilisha keys na ondoa history.

### Done when
- [ ] Folder tree ipo na iko wazi.
- [ ] .env.example ina keys.
- [ ] .gitignore imezuia .env.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Orodha ya MVP
- Stack uliochagua

### Steps
1. Tengeneza folder tree.
2. Ongeza .env.example.
3. Thibitisha .gitignore.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Folder tree | |
| Env keys | |
| Gitignore status | |
| Local run result | |

> **Pro tip:** Tumia env templates kama sehemu ya onboarding.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Ongeza key moja mpya kwenye template.

### Output
.env.example iliyosasishwa.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, keys zote zimeorodheshwa?
- [ ] Je, secrets zimezuiwa kwenye git?
- [ ] Je, muundo wa mradi ni wazi?
- [ ] Je, app ina-run na values za mfano?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Vigezo 3 kati ya 4 vimetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Terminal

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **12 Factor App Config**. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://12factor.net/config

2. **GitHub Secrets Guide**. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/security-guides/encrypted-secrets

## Read more (optional)

1. **Vercel Environment Variables**
   Why: Miongozo ya env vars kwenye deployment.
   Read: https://vercel.com/docs/projects/environment-variables

lessons.title: Misingi ya OpenAI API na mbinu salama
lessons.content:
# Lesson 10: Misingi ya OpenAI API na mbinu salama

**One-liner:** Tuma mwito wa OpenAI API unaotabirika na unaolindwa kwa hatua za msingi.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Mwito wa OpenAI unaofanya kazi na Ushughulikiaji wa Hitilafu

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kutekeleza mwito wa msingi wa OpenAI API wenye chaguo-msingi salama na ushughulikiaji wa hitilafu.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Mwito unarudisha jibu kwa input ya mfano.
- [ ] Hitilafu zinashughulikiwa kwa ujumbe salama.
- [ ] API key imehifadhiwa kwenye env variable.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Mwito wa OpenAI unaofanya kazi na Ushughulikiaji wa Hitilafu
- **Format:** Kipande cha code na log ya majaribio
- **Where saved:** Repo na noti za kozi ndani ya folda ya kozi

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayejenga app ya AI
**Secondary persona(s):** Watumiaji wanaotegemea output thabiti
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika wa ujenzi

## What

### What it is
Ni mwito mdogo wa upande wa server kwenda OpenAI API wenye chaguo-msingi salama.
Unarudisha jibu linaloweza kutumiwa, na ukishindwa unatoa ujumbe unaoeleweka.

### What it is not
Si mfumo kamili wa agent wala orchestration ya hatua nyingi.
Ni kizuizi cha kwanza thabiti unachoweza kukitegemea.

### 2-minute theory
- Chaguo-msingi salama hupunguza tabia zisizotarajiwa na mshtuko wa gharama.
- Ushughulikiaji wa hitilafu unaoeleweka hulinda uaminifu wa mtumiaji kwenye siku mbaya.
- Env variables hulinda siri zisitoke kwenye codebase.

### Key terms
- **API key:** Siri ya kuthibitisha mwito.
- **Fallback:** Njia mbadala salama wakati API inashindwa.

## Where

### Applies in
- Njia za server
- Huduma za backend

### Does not apply in
- Uhifadhi wa siri kwenye client

### Touchpoints
- API route
- Kumbukumbu za hitilafu
- Mpangilio wa env

## When

### Use it when
- Unaongeza vipengele vya AI
- Unahitaji jibu la kwanza lililo thabiti

### Frequency
Mara moja kwa bidhaa, kisha rejea kadri vipengele vinavyoongezeka

### Late signals
- Hitilafu nyingi bila ujumbe wazi
- Siri kuingia kwenye repo

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Ufuatiliaji wa matatizo kwa haraka
- Deployments salama bila key kuvuja
- Uzoefu bora kwa mtumiaji wakati API inachelewa

### Risks of ignoring
- API key kuvuja na gharama zisizotarajiwa
- Hitilafu zisizoeleweka zinazopunguza uaminifu

### Expectations
- Improves: uthabiti na uaminifu
- Does not guarantee: output kamili

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Hifadhi API key kwenye env variable.
2. Tuma request yenye prompt fupi na inayoweza kupimwa.
3. Ongeza timeout na ushughulikiaji wa hitilafu.
4. Rudisha njia mbadala salama ikitokea hitilafu.
5. Rekodi request id kwa ufuatiliaji.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Weka prompts fupi na zinazoweza kupimwa
- Rekodi hitilafu pamoja na muktadha wa request

**Don't**
- Kuweka API key kwenye client
- Kuficha hitilafu kwenye logs

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Key iko kwenye code. **Fix:** Hamisha kwenye env na badilisha key.
- **Mistake:** Hakuna njia mbadala salama. **Fix:** Ongeza ujumbe salama wa fallback.

### Done when
- [ ] Mwito unafanikiwa kwa input ya mfano.
- [ ] Hitilafu zinatoa ujumbe wazi.
- [ ] API key iko kwenye env.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- OpenAI API key kwenye env
- Prompt ya mfano

### Steps
1. Andika function ya request.
2. Ongeza ushughulikiaji wa hitilafu na ujumbe wa fallback.
3. Endesha test na uandike matokeo.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Input prompt | |
| Response sample | |
| Error handling | |
| Fallback message | |

> **Pro tip:** Tumia request id kwenye logs ili kufuatilia hitilafu.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Badilisha prompt na uhakikishe output bado inafanya kazi.

### Output
Test log yenye prompt mpya na response.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, API key iko kwenye env variables?
- [ ] Je, hitilafu zinatoa ujumbe salama kwa mtumiaji?
- [ ] Je, fallback response ipo?
- [ ] Je, test run imeandikwa?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Vigezo 3 kati ya 4 vimetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Terminal

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **OpenAI API Docs**. OpenAI. 2026-02-06.
   Read: https://platform.openai.com/docs

2. **OWASP API Security Top 10**. OWASP. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://owasp.org/www-project-api-security/

## Read more (optional)

1. **OpenAI Safety Best Practices**
   Why: Mbinu za ulinzi kwa AI features thabiti.
   Read: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/safety-best-practices

quizQuestions.question: Unajenga app ya AI na unahitaji kulinda API key. Mpangilio upi ni sahihi na salama zaidi kwa mazingira ya kibiashara?
options: Weka API key kwenye client na ufanye obfuscation ili isiweze kusomwa kirahisi.
Hifadhi API key kwenye env variable ya server na tuma maombi kupitia server route.
Tuma API key kwenye browser kupitia endpoint ya public ili iwe rahisi kuibadilisha.
Weka API key kwenye local storage kwa kila mtumiaji ili irahisishe cache.

quizQuestions.question: Mwito wa OpenAI API unachelewa na unapata timeout. Ujumbe upi wa mtumiaji ni bora ili kulinda uaminifu na kutoa hatua inayofuata?
options: “Hitilafu ya ndani. Tafadhali usijaribu tena.”
“Hakuna majibu. Tumeondoa ujumbe wako.”
“Huduma ina ucheleweshaji. Jaribu tena baada ya dakika chache.”
“Tatizo ni la mtumiaji. Badilisha mtandao wako.”

quizQuestions.question: Unataka kuzuia gharama zisizotarajiwa na tabia zisizo thabiti kwenye mwito wa kwanza wa OpenAI API. Ni mchanganyiko upi wa hatua ni bora?
options: Tumia prompt ndefu zaidi, zima logging, na ongeza max tokens bila kikomo.
Weka max tokens ndogo, timeout ya majaribio, na utumie fallback message.
Ruhusu client kutuma API key ili kupunguza latency na gharama za server.
Ondoa validation ya input ili kupunguza muda wa utekelezaji.

quizQuestions.question: Unahitaji kurekodi hitilafu bila kuvunja faragha ya mtumiaji. Ni njia ipi ni bora?
options: Log kila prompt kamili ya mtumiaji pamoja na data binafsi.
Tumia request id, error code, na muhtasari mfupi wa muktadha wa request.
Zima logs zote ili usihifadhi data yoyote.
Log API key ili iwe rahisi ku-trace matatizo.

quizQuestions.question: Unapata error ya 429 rate limit kutoka OpenAI API. Hatua gani inafaa zaidi kwa app ya kibiashara?
options: Rudisha ujumbe wa fallback, log tukio, na jaribu tena kwa backoff.
Rudisha stack trace kwa mtumiaji ili ajitambue kilichotokea.
Rudisha 500 bila ujumbe na uache mtumiaji ajaribu mwenyewe.
Ongeza max tokens ili kupunguza idadi ya requests.

quizQuestions.question: Unapoweka env variables kwa deployment, ni hatua ipi inasaidia kudumisha usalama wa API key?
options: Weka API key moja kwa moja kwenye README ili timu yote iweze kuiona.
Tumia `.env` ya ndani, ongeza kwenye `.gitignore`, na weka key kwenye mazingira ya production.
Weka API key kwenye client na uiweke kwa base64 ili isiweze kusomwa.
Weka API key kwenye test fixtures ili tests ziwe rahisi kuendesha.

quizQuestions.question: Unahitaji fallback message inayosaidia mtumiaji bila kutoa ahadi za uongo. Ni ipi ni bora?
options: “Nimekamilisha kazi yako kikamilifu.” hata kama API ilishindwa.
“Sina majibu kwa sasa. Tafadhali jaribu tena baada ya muda mfupi.”
“Tatizo ni upande wako. Badilisha swali.”
“Hakuna kitu cha kufanya. Tunafunga.”

lessons.title: Muundo wa prompt kwa uthabiti
lessons.content:
# Lesson 11: Muundo wa prompt kwa uthabiti

**One-liner:** Buni prompts zinazotoa output thabiti na inayoweza kupimwa.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Spec ya Prompt na Seti ya Majaribio

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kuandika spec ya prompt na seti ndogo ya majaribio inayoongeza uthabiti.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Prompt ina role, task, na output format.
- [ ] Seti ya majaribio ina angalau inputs 5 zinazoonyesha matumizi halisi.
- [ ] Angalau 4 kati ya 5 ya majaribio yanatimiza output inayotarajiwa.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Spec ya Prompt na Seti ya Majaribio
- **Format:** Hati ya prompt na jedwali la majaribio
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayetengeneza prompts kwa app ya AI ya kibiashara
**Secondary persona(s):** Watumiaji wanaotegemea output thabiti
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika wa ujenzi

## What

### What it is
Spec iliyo wazi inayomwambia model nini ifanye na jinsi output iwekwe.
Seti ndogo ya majaribio inayofichua udhaifu kabla ya watumiaji kuuona.

### What it is not
Si prompt ndefu inayojaribu kusuluhisha kila edge case.
Si mbadala wa mantiki ya bidhaa au validation ya mfumo.

### 2-minute theory
- Prompt ni interface ya bidhaa, lazima iwe thabiti.
- Muundo wazi hupunguza drift ya output na mshangao.
- Seti ndogo ya majaribio hukamata makosa mapema kwa effort ndogo.

### Key terms
- **Prompt spec:** Maagizo yaliyopangwa yenye role, task, na format.
- **Test set:** Inputs chache zinazotumika kupima ubora wa output.

## Where

### Applies in
- System prompts
- Prompts maalum za feature

### Does not apply in
- Nakala ya UX pekee au maudhui ya masoko

### Touchpoints
- Faili za prompt
- Test cases
- Output logs

## When

### Use it when
- Unaongeza feature mpya ya AI
- Ubora wa output hauko thabiti

### Frequency
Kila prompt inapobadilika

### Late signals
- Watumiaji wanalalamika kuhusu output tofauti
- Muundo wa output unavunjika

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Output thabiti zaidi
- Debugging ya haraka
- Uaminifu bora kwa mtumiaji

### Risks of ignoring
- Output isiyotabirika
- Mzigo mkubwa wa support

### Expectations
- Improves: uthabiti na uwazi
- Does not guarantee: usahihi kamili

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Andika role na task katika sentensi moja.
2. Fafanua output format kwa mfano mfupi.
3. Ongeza constraints kama tone au urefu.
4. Tengeneza inputs 5 za majaribio.
5. Endesha tests na rekodi pass rate.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Tumia output formats zilizo wazi
- Weka prompts fupi na zinazolenga jambo moja

**Don't**
- Changanya tasks nyingi kwenye prompt moja
- Kuruka majaribio ya inputs halisi

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Format si wazi. **Fix:** Toa template iliyopangwa.
- **Mistake:** Hakuna tests. **Fix:** Ongeza seti ndogo ya majaribio.

### Done when
- [ ] Prompt ina role, task, na format.
- [ ] Seti ya majaribio ina inputs 5.
- [ ] Pass rate imeandikwa.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Maelezo ya feature yako
- Inputs 5 za mtumiaji

### Steps
1. Andika spec ya prompt yenye role, task, na format.
2. Andika output inayotarajiwa kwa kila input.
3. Rekodi pass au fail.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Prompt spec | |
| Input set | |
| Expected output | |
| Pass rate | |

> **Pro tip:** Tumia inputs halisi za watumiaji, sio mifano bora tu.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Fupisha prompt kwa asilimia 20 bila kupoteza uwazi.

### Output
Spec ya prompt iliyorekebishwa na matokeo mapya ya tests.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, prompt ina role, task, na format?
- [ ] Je, inputs ni halisi na mbalimbali?
- [ ] Je, pass rate imeandikwa?
- [ ] Je, prompt ni rahisi kusoma?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Tests 4 kati ya 5 zimepita
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **OpenAI Prompt Engineering Guide**. OpenAI. 2026-02-06.
   Read: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/prompt-engineering

2. **Prompting Best Practices**. Anthropic. 2026-02-06.
   Read: https://docs.anthropic.com/claude/docs/prompting

## Read more (optional)

1. **System Prompt Best Practices**
   Why: Mwongozo wa output thabiti.
   Read: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/prompt-engineering

quizQuestions.question: Mjenzi anataka kufupisha prompt. Ni kitu gani kinaweza kuondolewa bila kuharibu uwazi?
options: Output format ambayo ndiyo msingi wa muundo.

Maelezo ya task yenyewe kwa mazingira ya app ya AI ya kibiashara.

# Lesson 12: Tool calling na actions

**One-liner:** Unganisha model na tools na ulinde actions zisizo salama.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Tool Schema na Mfano wa Action

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kufafanua tool schema na kuendesha tool call salama.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Tool schema ina name, inputs, na output shape.
- [ ] Tool call inaendeshwa kwa mfano halisi.
- [ ] Actions zisizo salama zimezuiwa.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Tool Schema na Mfano wa Action
- **Format:** JSON schema na test log
- **Where saved:** Repo na noti za kozi ndani ya folda ya kozi

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayejenga AI features zenye tools
**Secondary persona(s):** Watumiaji wanaochochea actions
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika wa ujenzi

## What

### What it is
Ufafanuzi wa tool unaoonyesha model nini inaweza kuita na vipi.
Mfano mdogo unaothibitisha tool call inafanya kazi kama ilivyokusudiwa.

### What it is not
Si mfumo kamili wa automation au permissions.
Ni hatua ya kwanza ya actions salama na zinazotabirika.

### 2-minute theory
- Tool calling huleta AI zaidi ya maandishi.
- Schema wazi hupunguza makosa ya input.
- Guardrails huzuia actions zisizotarajiwa.

### Key terms
- **Tool schema:** Ufafanuzi wa inputs na outputs kwa tool.
- **Guardrail:** Sheria ya kuzuia action zisizo salama.

## Where

### Applies in
- Agent workflows
- Backend services

### Does not apply in
- Uzalishaji wa maudhui pekee bila actions

### Touchpoints
- Tool definitions
- Action logs
- Permission checks

## When

### Use it when
- Unataka AI ichochee action
- Unahitaji inputs zinazotabirika

### Frequency
Kila unapoongeza tool mpya

### Late signals
- Tool calls kushindwa kwa inputs mbaya
- Actions zisizotarajiwa kutokea

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- AI feature zinakuwa na maana zaidi
- Failures chache kwenye automation
- Usalama na uaminifu bora

### Risks of ignoring
- Workflows kuvunjika
- Actions zisizo salama

### Expectations
- Improves: uthabiti na usalama
- Does not guarantee: maamuzi kamili

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Fafanua jina la tool na kusudi lake.
2. Bainisha input fields na types.
3. Fafanua output shape.
4. Ongeza guardrails kwa actions hatari.
5. Endesha test call na rekodi matokeo.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Validate inputs kabla ya utekelezaji
- Rekodi kila action

**Don't**
- Kuruhusu tools ziende bila checks
- Kufungua actions hatari bila control

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Schema legevu. **Fix:** Ongeza required fields na types.
- **Mistake:** Hakuna guardrails. **Fix:** Zuia parameters hatari.

### Done when
- [ ] Tool schema imefafanuliwa na kupimwa.
- [ ] Guardrails zinazuia inputs hatari.
- [ ] Logs zinaonyesha call iliyofanikiwa.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Wazo la tool moja
- Mfano wa input values

### Steps
1. Andika tool schema.
2. Ongeza guardrails kwa inputs hatari.
3. Endesha test call na rekodi output.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Tool name | |
| Input schema | |
| Guardrails | |
| Test result | |

> **Pro tip:** Ikiwa tool inaweza kubadilisha data, ongeza hatua ya kuthibitisha.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Ongeza guardrail moja zaidi na urudie test.

### Output
Schema iliyoboreshwa na test log mpya.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, schema iko wazi na ina types?
- [ ] Je, actions zisizo salama zimezuiwa?
- [ ] Je, test call imeandikwa?
- [ ] Je, logs zimehifadhiwa?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Tool call 1 imefanikiwa na guardrails
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **OpenAI Tools Guide**. OpenAI. 2026-02-06.
   Read: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/tools

2. **OWASP API Security Top 10**. OWASP. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://owasp.org/www-project-api-security/

## Read more (optional)

1. **Function Calling Best Practices**
   Why: Mbinu salama kwa tool calling.
   Read: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/tools

lessons.title: Muundo wa workflow ya agent
lessons.content:
# Lesson 13: Muundo wa workflow ya agent

**One-liner:** Panga hatua za agent ili ziwe wazi, ndogo, na zinazoweza kupimwa.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Ramani ya Workflow ya Agent na Hatua

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kubuni workflow ya agent yenye hatua wazi na vigezo vya mafanikio.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Workflow ina hatua angalau 4 zinazofuatana.
- [ ] Kila hatua ina input na output iliyoelezwa.
- [ ] Hatua moja ina guardrail au verification.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Ramani ya Workflow ya Agent na Hatua
- **Format:** Orodha ya hatua na mchoro rahisi
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayebuni workflow ya agent
**Secondary persona(s):** Watumiaji wanaotegemea matokeo sahihi
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika wa ujenzi

## What

### What it is
Mpangilio wa hatua ndogo ambazo agent hufuata ili kutoa matokeo.
Inaleta uwazi kwa input, output, na hatua za uamuzi.

### What it is not
Si mtiririko mrefu wa hatua zisizo na mipaka.
Si mbadala wa logic ya bidhaa au approvals.

### 2-minute theory
- Workflow iliyo wazi hupunguza makosa na kurudia kazi.
- Hatua ndogo hufanya agent kuwa rahisi kupima.
- Guardrails huzuia matokeo ya hatari.

### Key terms
- **Workflow:** Mpangilio wa hatua zinazofuatana kufikia lengo.
- **Guardrail:** Sheria inayozuia hatua hatari.

## Where

### Applies in
- Agent orchestration
- Backend flows

### Does not apply in
- Tasks moja inayokamilika kwa prompt moja

### Touchpoints
- Flow diagrams
- Step logs
- Test scenarios

## When

### Use it when
- Agent ina hatua nyingi
- Unahitaji ufuatiliaji wa makosa

### Frequency
Kila unapoanzisha agent mpya

### Late signals
- Agent kuruka hatua muhimu
- Output kutokueleweka

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Uthabiti wa matokeo
- Debugging ya haraka
- Usalama wa actions

### Risks of ignoring
- Workflow isiyoeleweka
- Matokeo yasiyotabirika

### Expectations
- Improves: uelewa na uthabiti
- Does not guarantee: matokeo kamili

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Tambua lengo la mwisho la agent.
2. Gawa kazi kuwa hatua ndogo 4 hadi 6.
3. Weka input na output kwa kila hatua.
4. Ongeza hatua ya verification au guardrail.
5. Andika mkondo wa data kati ya hatua.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Weka hatua fupi na zinazoeleweka
- Log hatua muhimu

**Don't**
- Kuruka hatua za uthibitisho
- Kuunganisha tasks nyingi kwenye hatua moja

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Hatua kubwa mno. **Fix:** Gawanya kuwa hatua mbili.
- **Mistake:** Hakuna verification. **Fix:** Ongeza check ya ubora.

### Done when
- [ ] Hatua zote zina input na output.
- [ ] Kuna angalau guardrail moja.
- [ ] Workflow ina mchoro au orodha iliyo wazi.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Lengo la agent
- Matokeo yanayotakiwa

### Steps
1. Andika hatua 5 za workflow.
2. Eleza input na output kwa kila hatua.
3. Ongeza guardrail kwenye hatua moja.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Step list | |
| Inputs | |
| Outputs | |
| Guardrail | |

> **Pro tip:** Anza na hatua ya kuelewa tatizo kabla ya kutoa output.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Punguza hatua moja na uone kama workflow bado inaeleweka.

### Output
Workflow iliyosafishwa na maelezo mapya.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, hatua zinafuatana kwa mpangilio?
- [ ] Je, input na output vimeelezwa?
- [ ] Je, kuna guardrail?
- [ ] Je, workflow ni rahisi kufuata?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Hatua 4 kati ya 5 ziko wazi
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **Agent Design Patterns**. OpenAI. 2026-02-06.
   Read: https://platform.openai.com/docs

2. **Workflow Automation Basics**. Zapier. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://zapier.com/learn/automation/what-are-workflows/

## Read more (optional)

1. **Agent Orchestration Guide**
   Why: Mifumo ya kupanga hatua za agent.
   Read: https://platform.openai.com/docs

lessons.title: Ushughulikiaji wa data na memory
lessons.content:
# Lesson 14: Ushughulikiaji wa data na memory

**One-liner:** Dhibiti data ya mtumiaji kwa njia salama na inayoweza kufuatiliwa.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Mpango wa Data na Memory

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kubuni mpango wa data na memory unaolinda faragha na ubora wa output.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Data types zimeainishwa na matumizi yake yameelezwa.
- [ ] Kuna sheria za kuhifadhi na kufuta data.
- [ ] Angalau risk moja ya faragha imeandikwa na hatua ya kuzuia.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Mpango wa Data na Memory
- **Format:** Jedwali la data na muhtasari wa sera
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayeshughulikia data ya app ya AI
**Secondary persona(s):** Watumiaji wanaojali faragha
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika wa ujenzi

## What

### What it is
Ufafanuzi wa aina za data unazokusanya, kwa nini, na jinsi ya kuzitumia.
Mpango wa memory unaoeleza nini kinahifadhiwa na kwa muda gani.

### What it is not
Si sera kamili ya kisheria.
Si kuhifadhi kila kitu bila mipaka.

### 2-minute theory
- Data isiyodhibitiwa huongeza hatari ya faragha.
- Memory fupi inaweza kuboresha uzoefu bila kuifadhi sana.
- Sheria za kufuta data hulinda uaminifu wa mtumiaji.

### Key terms
- **Memory:** Data ndogo ya muktadha inayotumika kuboresha mazungumzo.
- **Retention:** Muda wa kuhifadhi data kabla ya kufutwa.

## Where

### Applies in
- Hifadhi ya user data
- Logs na analytics

### Does not apply in
- Data ya majaribio ya ndani bila watumiaji halisi

### Touchpoints
- Database
- Privacy settings
- Export na delete requests

## When

### Use it when
- Unaanzisha akaunti za watumiaji
- Unaanza kuhifadhi mazungumzo

### Frequency
Rejea kila baada ya mabadiliko ya bidhaa

### Late signals
- Hakuna sheria za kufuta data
- Malalamiko ya faragha kutoka kwa watumiaji

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Faragha bora na uaminifu
- Uendeshaji salama wa data
- Kupunguza hatari za kisheria

### Risks of ignoring
- Kuvunja faragha
- Kushindwa kujibu maombi ya kufuta data

### Expectations
- Improves: faragha na udhibiti
- Does not guarantee: ulinzi kamili wa kisheria

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Orodhesha aina zote za data unazokusanya.
2. Andika sababu ya kila aina ya data.
3. Bainisha muda wa retention.
4. Ongeza njia ya kufuta data kwa mtumiaji.
5. Andika risk moja ya faragha na hatua ya kuzuia.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Kusanya data kwa sababu iliyo wazi
- Futa data isiyohitajika kwa muda

**Don't**
- Kusanya data nyingi bila sababu
- Kuhifadhi data bila mipaka

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Hakuna retention. **Fix:** Weka muda wa kuhifadhi.
- **Mistake:** Memory ya muda mrefu bila ruhusa. **Fix:** Tumia memory fupi au opt in.

### Done when
- [ ] Aina za data zimeandikwa na sababu zake.
- [ ] Retention imeelezwa.
- [ ] Hatua za faragha zimeainishwa.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Orodha ya features za data
- Mahitaji ya faragha

### Steps
1. Andika aina 5 za data unazotumia.
2. Weka retention kwa kila aina.
3. Ongeza risk na hatua ya kuzuia.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Data type | |
| Purpose | |
| Retention | |
| Risk and mitigation | |

> **Pro tip:** Kipaumbele ni data ndogo na matumizi wazi.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Andika ujumbe mfupi wa faragha unaoelezea data muhimu.

### Output
Privacy summary ya aya moja.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, data types zimeainishwa?
- [ ] Je, retention imeelezwa?
- [ ] Je, kuna njia ya kufuta data?
- [ ] Je, risk ya faragha imeainishwa?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Hatua 3 kati ya 4 zimekamilika
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **Data Retention Best Practices**. Mozilla. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Privacy

2. **OWASP Privacy Risks**. OWASP. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://owasp.org/

## Read more (optional)

1. **Privacy by Design Overview**
   Why: Misingi ya kujenga faragha tangu mwanzo.
   Read: https://www.ipc.on.ca/privacy-by-design/

lessons.title: Udhibiti wa gharama na rate limits
lessons.content:
# Lesson 15: Udhibiti wa gharama na rate limits

**One-liner:** Ongeza guardrails za kufanya gharama za AI zitabirike.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Orodha ya Ulinzi wa Gharama na Vikomo

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kuweka vikomo vya gharama na rate limits vinavyolinda bidhaa yako ya AI.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Orodha ya ulinzi wa gharama imekamilika.
- [ ] Rate limits zimefafanuliwa kwa endpoints muhimu.
- [ ] Kikomo cha gharama za mwezi kimeandikwa.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Orodha ya Ulinzi wa Gharama na Vikomo
- **Format:** Checklist na jedwali la limits
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayedhibiti gharama za AI
**Secondary persona(s):** Wateja wanaolipia wanaotegemea huduma thabiti
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika wa ujenzi

## What

### What it is
Seti ndogo ya sheria zinazoweka mipaka ya matumizi na kulinda bajeti.
Inachanganya kikomo cha gharama na rate limits ili mtumiaji mmoja asichome bajeti.

### What it is not
Si mfumo kamili wa fedha wala mbadala wa mkakati wa bei.
Ni safu ya ulinzi kwa bidhaa za hatua za mwanzo.

### 2-minute theory
- Gharama za AI zinaweza kukua haraka kwa matumizi makubwa.
- Rate limits hulinda uthabiti na bajeti kwa pamoja.
- Vikomo wazi hufanya majaribio ya bei kuwa salama.

### Key terms
- **Rate limit:** Sheria ya kuzuia idadi ya requests kwa mtumiaji au muda.
- **Cost cap:** Kiasi cha juu unachokubali kutumia kwa kipindi.

## Where

### Applies in
- API routes
- Billing logic

### Does not apply in
- Majaribio ya mkono ya mara moja

### Touchpoints
- Usage logs
- Billing dashboard
- Alerting rules

## When

### Use it when
- Unafungua app kwa watumiaji halisi
- Unaanza kutoza malipo

### Frequency
Weka mara moja, rekebisha kadri matumizi yanavyokua

### Late signals
- Spikes zisizo za kawaida za matumizi
- Bili kubwa kuliko ulivyotarajia

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Gharama zinatabirika
- Outages chache
- Udhibiti bora wa matumizi ya bure

### Risks of ignoring
- Bili za kushangaza
- Matumizi mabaya na heavy users

### Expectations
- Improves: uthabiti wa gharama na usalama
- Does not guarantee: margin kamili

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Chagua kikomo cha gharama za mwezi.
2. Fafanua rate limits kwa kila mtumiaji.
3. Ongeza kikomo cha kila siku kwa watumiaji wa bure.
4. Weka alerts kwa spikes.
5. Pitia matumizi kila wiki.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Anza na limits za tahadhari
- Rekodi matumizi kwa mtumiaji

**Don't**
- Toa matumizi ya bure bila controls
- Kusubiri bili ndipo uanze kuchukua hatua

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Hakuna cost cap. **Fix:** Weka kikomo kidogo cha mwezi.
- **Mistake:** Hakuna per user limits. **Fix:** Ongeza rate limits kwa mtumiaji.

### Done when
- [ ] Kikomo cha gharama za mwezi kimeandikwa.
- [ ] Rate limits zimefafanuliwa.
- [ ] Alerts zimesanidiwa.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Matumizi yanayotarajiwa kwa mtumiaji
- Dhana ya bei ya sasa

### Steps
1. Kadiria gharama kwa request.
2. Weka bajeti ya mwezi.
3. Fafanua limits kwa mtumiaji.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Cost per request | |
| Monthly cap | |
| Rate limits | |
| Alert trigger | |

> **Pro tip:** Anza na cap ndogo kisha ongeza baada ya kuona matumizi halisi.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Tengeneza sheria ya heavy user na uandike hatua ya kuchukua.

### Output
Sheria ya heavy user na response yake.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, kikomo cha mwezi kimefafanuliwa?
- [ ] Je, per user limits zimefafanuliwa?
- [ ] Je, alerts zimesanidiwa?
- [ ] Je, matumizi yanapitiwa kila wiki?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Ukaguzi 3 kati ya 4 umetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **OpenAI Pricing**. OpenAI. 2026-02-06.
   Read: https://platform.openai.com/pricing

2. **API Rate Limiting Guide**. Cloudflare. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://developers.cloudflare.com/rate-limits/

## Read more (optional)

1. **Usage Based Pricing**
   Why: Linganisha gharama na mipango ya bei.
   Read: https://www.profitwell.com/recur/all/usage-based-pricing

lessons.title: Muunganiko wa UI na UX copy
lessons.content:
# Lesson 16: Muunganiko wa UI na UX copy

**One-liner:** Weka AI kwenye UI kwa njia inayoeleweka na inayoongoza mtumiaji.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** UI Integration Checklist na UX Copy

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kuunganisha AI kwenye UI na kuandika UX copy inayopunguza mkanganyiko.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] UI ina maeneo ya input na output yaliyo wazi.
- [ ] UX copy inaeleza matarajio na mipaka.
- [ ] Kuna ujumbe wa makosa ulio rafiki.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** UI Integration Checklist na UX Copy
- **Format:** Checklist na nakala ya UI
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayejenga UI ya app ya AI
**Secondary persona(s):** Watumiaji wa kwanza wa bidhaa
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika wa ujenzi

## What

### What it is
Mpangilio wa UI unaoonyesha wapi mtumiaji anaingiza input na wapi output inaonekana.
UX copy fupi inayoeleza kinachotokea na mipaka ya mfumo.

### What it is not
Si landing page ya masoko.
Si UI yenye vipengele vingi bila mwongozo.

### 2-minute theory
- UI wazi hupunguza makosa ya mtumiaji.
- UX copy inaweka matarajio na hulinda uaminifu.
- Ujumbe wa makosa unaeleweka huongeza matumizi.

### Key terms
- **UX copy:** Maneno mafupi kwenye UI yanayoongoza mtumiaji.
- **Empty state:** Ujumbe unaoonekana kabla ya data kuingia.

## Where

### Applies in
- Chat UI
- Form based AI tools

### Does not apply in
- Mfumo wa backend bila UI

### Touchpoints
- Input fields
- Output panel
- Error messages

## When

### Use it when
- Unaanza kuonyesha output kwa mtumiaji
- Watumiaji wanachanganyikiwa kuhusu hatua zao

### Frequency
Kila UI inapobadilika

### Late signals
- Watumiaji wanasema hawajui cha kuingiza
- Ujumbe wa makosa haueleweki

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Kupunguza maswali ya support
- Matokeo bora ya mtumiaji
- Uaminifu mkubwa

### Risks of ignoring
- Watumiaji kukata tamaa
- Matumizi kupungua

### Expectations
- Improves: uelewa wa mtumiaji
- Does not guarantee: retention kubwa

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Fafanua sehemu ya input na output.
2. Andika empty state inayomwongoza mtumiaji.
3. Ongeza helper text kuhusu mipaka.
4. Andika ujumbe wa makosa unaoeleweka.
5. Pitia UI na mtumiaji mmoja wa mfano.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Tumia maneno mafupi na ya moja kwa moja
- Onyesha mfano wa input

**Don't**
- Kuweka UI bila maelekezo
- Kuficha mipaka ya mfumo

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Hakuna empty state. **Fix:** Ongeza maelekezo kabla ya input.
- **Mistake:** Ujumbe wa makosa unaomlaumu mtumiaji. **Fix:** Andika ujumbe wa msaada.

### Done when
- [ ] Input na output ziko wazi.
- [ ] Empty state ipo.
- [ ] Ujumbe wa makosa ni rafiki.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Maelezo ya feature ya AI
- Mfano wa input

### Steps
1. Chora UI rahisi ya input na output.
2. Andika empty state na helper text.
3. Andika ujumbe wa makosa.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Input label | |
| Empty state text | |
| Helper text | |
| Error message | |

> **Pro tip:** Onyesha mfano wa input ili kupunguza makosa.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Boresha UX copy kwa kupunguza maneno 20 bila kupoteza maana.

### Output
UX copy iliyofupishwa na iliyo wazi.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, mtumiaji anajua cha kuingiza?
- [ ] Je, output inaonekana wapi?
- [ ] Je, ujumbe wa makosa ni rafiki?
- [ ] Je, helper text inaeleza mipaka?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Angalau 3 kati ya 4 vimetimia
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **UX Writing for AI**. Google. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://material.io/design

2. **Nielsen Norman UX Writing**. NNGroup. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://www.nngroup.com/articles/ux-writing/

## Read more (optional)

1. **Empty State Design**
   Why: Onboarding bora kwa watumiaji wapya.
   Read: https://www.nngroup.com/articles/empty-states/

lessons.title: Kupima agent kwa scenarios
lessons.content:
# Lesson 17: Kupima agent kwa scenarios

**One-liner:** Tumia scenarios halisi kupima tabia za agent kabla ya uzinduzi.  
**Time:** 20 hadi 30 dakika  
**Deliverable:** Seti ya Scenario za Majaribio ya Agent

## Learning goal

You will be able to: **Kuunda scenarios za majaribio na kupima agent kwa output thabiti.**

### Success criteria (observable)
- [ ] Seti ina angalau scenarios 5 za matumizi halisi.
- [ ] Kila scenario ina input na output inayotarajiwa.
- [ ] Angalau scenario moja ina edge case.

### Output you will produce
- **Deliverable:** Seti ya Scenario za Majaribio ya Agent
- **Format:** Jedwali la scenarios na matokeo
- **Where saved:** Kwenye folda ya kozi ndani ya `/generative-ai-2026-build-ai-apps-and-agents-sw/`

## Who

**Primary persona:** Digital nomad anayepima agent kabla ya uzinduzi
**Secondary persona(s):** Watumiaji wanaotegemea majibu thabiti
**Stakeholders (optional):** Washirika wa ujenzi

## What

### What it is
Orodha ya scenarios zinazowakilisha matumizi halisi ya watumiaji.
Kila scenario ina input, output inayotarajiwa, na uamuzi wa pass au fail.

### What it is not
Si test ya moja kwa moja ya units pekee.
Si orodha ya inputs zisizo na muktadha.

### 2-minute theory
- Scenarios halisi huonyesha udhaifu mapema.
- Edge cases hupima mipaka ya agent.
- Matokeo yaliyoandikwa huongeza uthabiti wa QA.

### Key terms
- **Scenario:** Hali ya matumizi inayojumuisha muktadha na lengo.
- **Edge case:** Hali nadra inayoweza kuvunja mfumo.

## Where

### Applies in
- Agent testing
- QA kabla ya uzinduzi

### Does not apply in
- Demos bila watumiaji halisi

### Touchpoints
- Scenario list
- Test logs
- Bug backlog

## When

### Use it when
- Unakaribia uzinduzi
- Unabadilisha workflow ya agent

### Frequency
Kila mabadiliko makubwa

### Late signals
- Watumiaji wanaripoti errors zisizoeleweka
- Agent inashindwa kwenye edge cases

## Why it matters

### Practical benefits
- Failures chache baada ya uzinduzi
- Uelewa bora wa mipaka ya agent
- Uaminifu wa mtumiaji

### Risks of ignoring
- Bugs kwenye mazingira ya production
- Support tickets nyingi

### Expectations
- Improves: uthabiti na uaminifu
- Does not guarantee: sifuri bugs

## How

### Step-by-step method
1. Orodhesha matumizi 5 ya kawaida.
2. Ongeza edge case moja muhimu.
3. Andika input na output inayotarajiwa.
4. Endesha tests na rekodi matokeo.
5. Tengeneza tiketi kwa errors muhimu.

### Do and don't

**Do**
- Tumia data halisi ya mfano
- Rekodi pass au fail

**Don't**
- Kuandika scenarios zisizo na muktadha
- Kuepuka edge cases

### Common mistakes and fixes
- **Mistake:** Scenarios ni za jumla sana. **Fix:** Ongeza muktadha wa mtumiaji.
- **Mistake:** Hakuna edge cases. **Fix:** Ongeza angalau moja.

### Done when
- [ ] Scenarios 5 zimeandikwa.
- [ ] Kila scenario ina output inayotarajiwa.
- [ ] Matokeo ya tests yameandikwa.

## Guided exercise (10 to 15 min)

### Inputs
- Orodha ya matumizi ya kawaida
- Mfano wa mtumiaji

### Steps
1. Andika scenarios 5.
2. Fafanua output inayotarajiwa kwa kila scenario.
3. Rekodi matokeo.

### Output format
| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Scenario | |
| Input | |
| Expected output | |
| Pass or fail | |

> **Pro tip:** Chagua scenario moja yenye data chafu ili kupima mipaka.

## Independent exercise (5 to 10 min)

### Task
Ongeza scenario moja ya juu ya hatari na ipime.

### Output
Scenario mpya na matokeo yake.

## Self-check (yes/no)

- [ ] Je, scenarios zina muktadha halisi?
- [ ] Je, kuna edge case?
- [ ] Je, matokeo yameandikwa?
- [ ] Je, bugs muhimu zimeandikwa?

### Baseline metric (recommended)
- **Score:** Scenarios 5 kati ya 6 zimepita
- **Date:** 2026-02-07
- **Tool used:** Notes app

## Bibliography (sources used)

1. **Testing AI Systems**. Microsoft. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://learn.microsoft.com/

2. **Scenario Based Testing**. Atlassian. 2024-01-01.
   Read: https://www.atlassian.com/continuous-delivery/software-testing/scenario-testing

## Read more (optional)

1. **Quality Assurance Basics**
   Why: Mfumo wa QA ulio rahisi kuanza nao.
   Read: https://www.atlassian.com/continuous-delivery/software-testing
